text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I lay out a plan to encourage Tamamo Cross to
eat more, little by little.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First, I have the best chefs I know cook her a pair
of delicious meals... but to no avail. It might be
delicious, but Tamamo Cross doesn't have room
in her stomach for the food.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But when she sees Gold City—her peer—striving
to eat a balanced diet to support both her racing
and modeling careers...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross has a change of heart. Although
she'll have to start small, she sets out to eat
better.
